title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: Grant Sanderson's 3Blue1Brown video explores the mathematical concept of taking the logarithm of an image, using Escher's Print Gallery as a motivating example. The video walks through conformal maps from complex analysis, the complex exponential and logarithm functions, and their application to understanding the self-similar structure in Escher's artwork.
